title: Sub-Decree No.131 on Forest and Non Timber Forest Products Allow For Export and Import_061128
title_en: Sub-Decree No.131 on Forest and Non Timber Forest Products Allow For Export and Import_061128
short_name: Sub-Decree No.131 on Forest and Non Timber Forest Product...

provisions.title: The objective of the Sub-decree is to identify Forest and Non-Timber Forest Products
The following products are allowed to export:
The following products are not allowed to export:
The following products are allowed to import:
Forest and non-timber forest products allowed to export or import are subjected to pay
provisions.content: taxes in accordance with existing laws.

provisions.title: As mentioned in article 2, paragraph B, point number 16 of this Sub-decree:
provisions.content:
A. Export of processed timber or non-timber forest products following traditional
style at family or tourist scales are allowed without requirement of export license,
and transportation permit issued by Head of Forestry Administration;

(Unofficial Translation: Legal application will base on Cambodian language). Page 2

B. Export of processed timber or non-timber forest products following traditional
style by client or third party for commercial purpose are allowed without Export
License requirement. However, transportation permit issue by Head of Forestry
Administration will be required.

provisions.title: Except products stipulated in article 2, paragraph B, point number 16 of this Sub-
provisions.content:
decree, export of timber and non-timber forest products as stipulated in article 2
require export license issue by Ministry of Commerce and visa by the Head of
Forestry Administration. Extension of export license validity will be issued by
Ministry of Commerce.

provisions.title: The import of processed and non-processed timber and non-timber forest products as
provisions.content:
stipulated in article 4 of this sub-decree for raw material of local industry production
require import license issue by the Ministry of Commerce with visa issue by the Head
of Forestry Administration and require transportation permit issue by the Head of
Forestry Administration.

provisions.title: Strictly ban the import of all kinds of epidemic plants, wildlife, and other flora or
provisions.content: fauna which impact local sources of genetic.

provisions.title: The Royal Government may allow the export or import of other forest and non-timber
provisions.content:
forest products when necessary according to regional, international, or national socio-
economic demand.

provisions.title: Forest and non-timber forest products will be allowed to export or import only through
Any regulation that is contrast to this Sub-decree is nullified.
provisions.content: Any regulation that is contrast to this Sub-decree is nullified.

provisions.title: Minister in charge of Council of Ministers, Minister of Agriculture Forestry and
provisions.content:
Fisheries, Minister of Economy and Finance, Minister of Commerce, Minister of
Environment, Minister of Health, Ministers, State Secretaries, of all relevant ministries,
must implement this Sub-decree in accordance with their respective duties from this
date of signature onward.

Capital city of Phnom Penh, 28th November 2006
Prime Minister
Singed and Sealed
HUN SEN
